$schema.description: Path to the JSON schema file

agents.description: Agent definitions. Each agent runs in its own terminal split.

command.description: Shell command template. Must include {{prompt}} placeholder.

commands.description: Named command shortcuts. Use {{arg}} for the optional argument placeholder.

prompt.description: Prompt template. Use {{arg}} for the optional argument placeholder.

promptNoArg.description: Fallback prompt when no argument is provided

requiresArg.description: Whether this command requires an argument
